title: Real cases in operation.
sub: Pick an area to see the projects already running in the field.

body.text: The Municipality faced a **dual challenge** that directly impacted safety and quality of life: **speeding** on key roads and unpredictable **traffic congestion**. The lack of accurate data prevented efficient urban planning.
We deployed a **vehicle speed and count monitoring system** at strategic points. This technology not only captures data, but transforms it into a management tool.
By **generating precise statistics** on vehicle quantity and speed, the Municipality stopped basing its decisions on assumptions.

Today, Tigre has **proactive urban planning**: controlling vehicle congestion through strategic resource allocation and optimizing traffic light timing, ensuring a safer and more efficient environment for all its citizens.

cases.h: Intelligent Flood Prevention and Water Management

body.text: The Municipality faced a critical **public safety and urban logistics challenge**: the **risk of flooding** from rising rivers and the flooding of key tunnels **during heavy storms**. The lack of real-time information prevented a preventive response.

We deployed a **water level monitoring system** using ultrasonic sensors at strategic points along waterways and underpasses. This technology transforms constant measurements into an **early warning tool**.
By generating real-time data, Civil Defense and Traffic departments stopped relying on manual visual inspections.

Today, the Municipality has **proactive emergency management**: able to anticipate overflows, automate the preventive closure of tunnels, and optimize crew deployment. **This ensures a safer environment and urban infrastructure resilient to climate change.**

cases.h: Optimization of Critical Response and Patient Safety

body.text: The clinic faced the challenge of optimizing response times in critical areas and ensuring immediate communication during high-complexity events, such as **Code Blue**. Reliance on traditional communication systems created bottlenecks that could compromise the agility required in emergency medical care.

We deployed a **hospital communication and alert system** integrating highly reliable **Panic, Code Blue, and Beeper devices**. This technology instantly notifies the assigned medical team, geolocating the emergency within the facility.
**By generating precise metrics** on response times, the clinic stopped basing its protocols on subjective perceptions.

Today, the clinic has **proactive medical care**: able to coordinate operating rooms and emergency teams with absolute precision, ensuring a safer environment for the patient and a highly efficient operation for healthcare staff.

cases.h: Precision Environmental Control and Regulatory Compliance

body.text: The Clinic faced the challenge of guaranteeing strict environmental conditions in its **operating rooms and sterilization areas**, where minimal temperature or humidity variations can compromise patient safety and the viability of critical medical supplies.

We deployed **a network of high-precision thermal and humidity sensors**. This technology monitors levels in real time and transforms them into an **immutable digital record**, triggering instant alerts when any deviation from preset thresholds occurs.
**By generating automatic traceability reports**, the client stopped dedicating staff hours to error-prone manual checks.

Today, the client has a proactively safe surgical environment: able to ensure successful quality audits and guarantee every procedure is performed under the optimal conditions required by international standards.

The client had a highly reliable but technologically "blind" operational infrastructure. Their control systems relied on **isolated analog interfaces** that required constant human supervision, causing delays in fault detection and loss of operational efficiency.

We implemented a network of **analog-to-digital conversion nodes** that capture signals from existing pressure, water flow, and gas sensors and translate them into industrial IoT protocols, centralizing all telemetry in an **intelligent SCADA system** for remote visualization.
By **digitalizing 100% of critical variables**, the company moved from manual inspections to a model of **centralized and automated control.**

Today, the plant has an **intelligent and connected operation**: having eliminated information silos, reduced downtime from undetected failures, and achieved full process traceability without replacing original machinery.

The client faced the **challenge of supervising a distributed network of assets** where anomaly detection — such as overloads or temperature variations — depended on periodic physical inspections. The **lack of real-time visibility** into transformer status increased the risk of catastrophic failures.

We deployed a **power control and critical parameter monitoring system for transformers**, continuously capturing data on load, temperature, and efficiency, transforming it into a predictive maintenance tool.
By generating **precise statistics** on the behavior of each unit, Bromteck moved from fixed-schedule maintenance to condition-based asset management.

Today, Bromteck has proactive infrastructure management: able to prevent failures before they occur, optimize network load, and extend equipment lifespan, ensuring a stable and efficient power supply.

The Municipality faced the challenge of ensuring **security in educational institutions and their surroundings**, where rapid communication during incidents was vital but fragmented. The lack of a direct connection to the municipal monitoring center made immediate and coordinated response difficult.

We deployed a **camera system** at strategic points in schools, integrated directly with the Municipality's operations center. This technology transforms each distress signal into an automatic intervention protocol.
**By generating real-time data** on events, the Municipality moved from reacting to incidents to proactive prevention planning.

Today, the Municipality has **proactively protected schools**: able to drastically reduce patrol or ambulance response times, deter acts of vandalism, and provide peace of mind to the entire educational community.
The Municipality faced the challenge of effectively integrating the community into crime prevention. Traditional neighborhood alarm systems were limited and operated locally.

We connected the **neighborhood alarm ecosystem** with the municipality's monitoring center. This technology transforms each activation into a geolocated emergency event in the Municipal Operations Center (MOC), identifying who triggered the alert and the exact location.
By generating **precise statistics** on the highest-activation zones, the Municipality stopped **patrolling blindly** and began basing routes on **real incident heat maps**.

Today the Municipality has a **proactively protected community**: able to coordinate patrol response in seconds, reduce vandalism in neighborhoods, and restore peace to public spaces through a transparent, highly reliable technological tool.
